name: Unsigned Image Loaded Into LSASS Process
description: An unsigned executable or DLL has been loaded into the critical LSASS.exe process, indicating a probable credential dumping attempt, malicious injection, or persistence mechanism.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of when the unsigned image was loaded into LSASS.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname of the system where the event occurred.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user context under which the image was loaded.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the LSASS process (e.g., C:\Windows\System32\lsass.exe).

parameters.name: LoadedImage
parameters.description: The full path to the unsigned DLL or executable loaded into LSASS.

parameters.name: Signed
parameters.description: The digital signature status of the loaded image (expected 'false').

parameters.name: SignatureStatus
parameters.description: The status of the signature validation (e.g., 'Not signed').

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the alert, if available.
